nasb.text: But the exiles did so. And Ezra the priest selected men who were heads of fathers’ households for each of their father’s households, all of them by name. So they convened on the first day of the tenth month to investigate the matter.

esv.text: Then the returned exiles did so. Ezra the priest selected men, heads of fathers’ houses, according to their fathers’ houses, each of them designated by name. On the first day of the tenth month they sat down to examine the matter;

cnv.text: 於是，被擄歸回的人就這樣行。以斯拉祭司提名選派了一些人，是各宗族的族長，於十月初一他們一同坐下來查辦這事。

ccb.text: 流亡归来的人都遵照建议而行。以斯拉祭司按家族选出各族长，都是点名指定的。他们从十月一日开始着手查办这事，
